summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification shard. No GitHub mutations planned. The preflight artifact reports no security-sensitive hydrated refs and no shared canonical; each hydrated PR is classified independently. Open PRs are kept independent for maintainer/product review because merge, fix, and low-signal closeout are disabled. Already-closed PRs are recorded as skipped keep_closed. Five listed candidates were absent from the compacted hydrated item matrix, so they are non-mutating needs_human for missing live preflight state.
